question: What is the price of an annual ATM transit pass for students under 27 in Milan, and how does it compare with the standard adult annual urban pass?
answer:
The annual ATM transit pass for students in Milan costs **about €200**. [source: relocation/www-collegiate-it-quanto-costa-studiare-a-milano.md]

I don’t have the price of the **standard adult annual urban pass** in the available sources, so I can’t calculate an annual-to-annual comparison.

Relevant related figures in the sources: students/young people under 27 pay **€22.00 per month**, while the standard adult monthly pass costs **€39**. [source: relocation/helphousing-com-it-blog-costo-della-vita-a-milano-per-gli-studenti.md] Students up to 27 pay **22€** monthly, and students older than 27 pay **39€** monthly. [source: career_readiness/mba-inside-wharton-upenn-edu-wp-content-uploads-2024-12-sda-bocconi-factsheet-ay2025-26-pdf.md]

question: List the steps an international student must follow to register with Italy's National Health Service (SSN) in Milan.

Confrontando i bus diretti da Malpensa a Milano Centrale tra i vettori documentati (Autostradale/Malpensa Bus Express, Terravision, Flibco, FlixBus): qual e' il prezzo di partenza piu' basso indicato per ciascun vettore?
answer:
| Vettore | Prezzi indicati nelle fonti | Prezzo di partenza più basso indicato |
|---|---:|---:|
| Autostradale / Malpensa Bus Express | “Biglietto singolo: a partire da 8 euro” e anche “Da 4,99€ a persona” per il bus Malpensa T1/T2–Stazione Centrale. [source: relocation/www-aeroporto-net-aeroporto-milano-malpensa-collegamenti-aeroporto-milano-malpensa.md] | **4,99€ a persona** [source: relocation/www-aeroporto-net-aeroporto-milano-malpensa-collegamenti-aeroporto-milano-malpensa.md] |
| Terravision | Biglietti online “a partire da 6-10 euro” e anche “Da 10,00€ a persona” per il trasferimento Malpensa T1/T2–centro di Milano. [source: relocation/www-aeroporto-net-aeroporto-milano-malpensa-collegamenti-aeroporto-milano-malpensa.md] | **6 euro** [source: relocation/www-aeroporto-net-aeroporto-milano-malpensa-collegamenti-aeroporto-milano-malpensa.md] |
| Flibco | Biglietti “a partire da circa 8-10 euro” per Malpensa Terminal 1/2 verso Milano Lampugnano, Milano Centrale e San Donato. [source: relocation/www-aeroporto-net-aeroporto-milano-malpensa-collegamenti-aeroporto-milano-malpensa.md] | **circa 8 euro** [source: relocation/www-aeroporto-net-aeroporto-milano-malpensa-collegamenti-aeroporto-milano-malpensa.md] |
| FlixBus | Biglietti “a partire da circa 6 euro”; la fonte però non specifica esplicitamente la tratta diretta Malpensa–Milano Centrale. [source: relocation/www-aeroporto-net-aeroporto-milano-malpensa-collegamenti-aeroporto-milano-malpensa.md] | **circa 6 euro**, ma non documentato specificamente per Malpensa–Milano Centrale. [source: relocation/www-aeroporto-net-aeroporto-milano-malpensa-collegamenti-aeroporto-milano-malpensa.md] |

Quindi, tra i prezzi documentati, il valore più basso indicato è **4,99€ a persona per Autostradale / Malpensa Bus Express**. [source: relocation/www-aeroporto-net-aeroporto-milano-malpensa-collegamenti-aeroporto-milano-malpensa.md]

question: Quale documento devo portare per accedere alla Biblioteca Bocconi, e qual e' la capienza massima dell'edificio?
answer:
Per accedere alla Biblioteca devi avere con te la **Bocconi ID card / badge Bocconi** oppure usare il **QR code generato tramite yoU@B**. [source: life_on_campus/bit-unibocconi-it-hc-en-us-articles-4405876182418-how-do-i-get-into-the-library.md] La **prenotazione del posto studio è obbligatoria**. [source: life_on_campus/bit-unibocconi-it-hc-en-us-articles-4405876182418-how-do-i-get-into-the-library.md]

La **capienza massima della Biblioteca è di 720 persone**. [source: life_on_campus/bit-unibocconi-it-hc-en-us-articles-4405876182418-how-do-i-get-into-the-library.md]

question: Provide a structured table of the dining areas available on the Bocconi campus, indicating the location of each and its meal/opening pattern.
For the Bocconi MSc graduate Exchange Program selection score, how are academic GPA, credits, and Bachelor degree grade weighted? Show the weights and explain.
answer:
For the **Bocconi MSc graduate Exchange Program 2026-27**, the selection score is merit-based and weights three components: [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md]

| Component | Meaning | Weight |
|---|---:|---:|
| **WA** | Student academic weighted credit average | **50%** [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md] |
| **NC / MAX NC** | Number of credits earned divided by the maximum number of credits that can be earned | **20%** [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md] |
| **Bachelor degree grade** | Final degree grade for the Bachelor program / **Laurea Triennale** | **30%** [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md] |

The result of the score formula is then multiplied by **1000** to obtain the final score. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md]

For the credits component, Bocconi counts exams from the **1st year, 1st semester study plan** officially taken by **February 3rd, 2026 included**, at the end of the ordinary exam session. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md] Exams outside that study plan, such as **internship, languages, anticipated exams and anticipated curricular supplementary activities**, are not included. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md] Courses divided into modules are considered as **separate courses** for academic requirements and exchange score calculation. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md]

question: What is the application deadline for the Bocconi Double Degree program with MIT (Massachusetts Institute of Technology)?
answer:
There is no Bocconi Double Degree program with MIT / Massachusetts Institute of Technology in the available sources, so I don’t have an application deadline for a Bocconi–MIT Double Degree. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-double-degree-program-double-degree-selection-during-1st-ye.md] [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-double-degree-program-double-degree-peking-university.md]

Relevant Double Degree deadlines/timing I can ground:

1. For Double Degree programs with selection during the 1st year of MSc programs, the application period is listed as **November/December**. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-double-degree-program-double-degree-selection-during-1st-ye.md]  
2. For the Double Degree with **Peking University**, Bocconi Step 1 online application is at the **end of September**, and Peking Step 2 online application is in **October/November**. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-double-degree-program-double-degree-peking-university.md]  
3. For ESS and IM Concentrations candidates, a valid language certificate must be submitted by **January 26, 2026** if needed. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-double-degree-program-application-selection-timeline-referr.md]

question: How many different paid Bocconi Sport Membership tiers are listed for the 2025/2026 season, and which is the cheapest one available to UB and SDA Bocconi students?
answer:
The sources list **5 Bocconi Sport Membership tiers with stated prices** for the 2025/2026 season: **Student €27**, **Full Student €55**, **Premium €100**, **Community €40**, and **Full Community €80**. [source: life_on_campus/www-bocconisport-eu-en-news-bocconi-sport-membership.md]

For **UB and SDA Bocconi students**, the cheapest listed option is the **Student Membership Fee**, at **€27.00**. [source: life_on_campus/www-bocconisport-eu-en-news-bocconi-sport-membership.md]

Note: the source also shows a **Community “Premium Fee”** heading, but the provided text does not include its price, so I have not counted it among tiers with stated prices. [source: life_on_campus/www-bocconisport-eu-en-news-bocconi-sport-membership.md]
